source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4
distilled_thesis: The morning stance of waiting keeps the route relational: Zarathustra appears as one who has long stood ready for the sun's giving.
